text: >> Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Evelyn. So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits with up to $300 available on your Medicare account through your state's release program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet? Yes. So I was asking if you received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan. Thank you.
